queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT unique_id, status, execution_time, rows_affected, node_type, name
FROM jaffle_shop.run_results
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT unique_id, status, execution_time, rows_affected, node_type, name

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT status, count(status) as count FROM (SELECT unique_id, status, execution_time, rows_affected, node_type, name
FROM jaffle_shop.run_results) GROUP BY 1
queries.inputQueryString: SELECT status, count(status) as count FROM ${results} GROUP BY 1
